description: These slip-on heels from catwalk are given a fresh twist with the elasitcated straps on the front. The simple design is perfect for evening wear and versatile enough to be teamed with dresses and casuals.UpperElasticated straps from the forefoot knotted on the midfoot for a snug Fit and added styleFabric covered footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfort and added styleOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured design on the forefoot and heel for added comfortSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
